example: Don't give up! Keep trying.

I'll call you back later.

We ran out of coffee.
I found out the truth eventually.
I work out at the gym daily.

example: Carry on with your work.
Please calm down and breathe.
Cheer up! Things will get better.
example_tr: Neşelen! Her şey daha iyi olacak.

example: He didn't show up for the meeting.
I grew up in a small town.
Don't bring up that topic again.
Give back my book!
I take back what I said, I'm sorry.
Look up the unknown words.

example: Do you get along with your boss?
It took time to get over the breakup.

meaning: telefonla ulaşmak, zor bir süreci bitirmek
example: I finally got through to customer service.

He cheated but got away with it.

example: It's hard to get by on this salary.

example: The movie didn't live up to the hype.

example: It was a serious accident, but he pulled through.

example: He loves showing off his new car.

I took up painting recently.

example: Walking all day wore me out.
example_tr: Tüm gün yürümek beni perişan etti.

example: Once he decides, he never backs down.
example_tr: Bir kez karar verince asla geri adım atmaz.

example: The state had to bail out the bankrupt bank.
example_tr: Devlet iflas eden bankayı kurtarmak zorunda kaldı.

example: Please bear with me while I find the file.
example_tr: Dosyayı bulana kadar lütfen benimle biraz sabret.

meaning: tek bir sebebe dayanmak, özetle ... olmak
example: It all boils down to lack of money.
I must brush up on my French before the trip.

example: Police are cracking down on drug dealers.
example_tr: Polis, uyuşturucu satıcılarına karşı sert önlemler alıyor.

example: You should cut back on salty foods.

example: His plan didn't pan out as expected.

example: We must stick to the original plan.

example: The anesthesia will wear off in an hour.

example: Players must abide by the referee's decision.

meaning: aynı konuyu temcit pilavı gibi tekrarlamak
example: Stop harping on about my mistakes!

example_tr: Ekonomi hakkında saatlerce uzun uzun konuştu.

example: He reeled off a list of names.

example: I saw through his lies immediately.

example: Feel free to chime in if you have ideas.

example: Let's meet to thrash out the details.
